prompt: 使用 IDAES 构建一个简单的 flash 模拟：苯-甲苯混合物 (50/50 mol%), 进料 1 mol/s, 350 K, 1 atm。flash 绝热等压操作。求解并报告气液相组成和温度。

assertions.description: Imports include FlowsheetBlock, Flash/Feed/Product, BTXParameterBlock or GenericParameterBlock, get_solver, Arc, TransformationFactory
Attaches a property package (BTXParameterBlock or GenericParameterBlock with benzene+toluene config)
Creates Feed, Flash (with has_heat_transfer and has_pressure_change), and Product units
Connects units with Arcs and calls TransformationFactory('network.expand_arcs')
Fixes feed flow_mol=1.0, T=350K, P=101325Pa, mole_frac_comp['benzene']=0.5, mole_frac_comp['toluene']=0.5
Checks or ensures degrees_of_freedom == 0 before solving
Sequentially initializes units (feed→flash) with propagate_state between them
Calls get_solver + solver.solve(m) to solve the model
Reports results using unit.report() or manual print of vapor/liquid composition and temperature
